generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HokuyoLiDARActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis actuator for LiDAR point cloud processing and steering control integration via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation component converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for ACC implementation"
]

instance VedderSteeringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation component implementing real-time steering commands derived from ACC logic"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor (Hokuyo UST-10LX) for 3D object detection providing raw point clouds for ACC perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PointCloudDataRaw
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera (Intel Deepsense D435i) providing environmental context via processed depth images for ACC situational awareness"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state sensors capturing speed and steering angle metrics for real-time ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateMetrics
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction data streams
instance PointCloudDataRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudDataRaw
]

instance ProcessedEgoStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateMetrics
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CADVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization model for user interface rendering of ACC system components and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationFE
]

instance RealTimeStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Real-time state model capturing ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and object tracks for ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllingFE
]

instance TimeseriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical timeseries data repository for ACC performance analysis and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks, ProcessedEgoStateMetrics
]

instance CurrentStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current real-time metrics of ego vehicle state and object tracks for immediate ACC decision making"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks, ProcessedEgoStateMetrics
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllingFE
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware facilitating component communication between physical twin and digital twin entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, EgoStateProcessingFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK enabling Jetson Orin Nano programming for real-time perception and control processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringFE, EgoStateProcessingFE, ACCControllingFE
]

instance Python38Environment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of ACC perception and control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, EgoStateProcessingFE
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex system modeling and validation of ACC algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControllingFE
]

instance ROS2Packages : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 packages implementing ISO 23247 Feature Engineering components for modular ACC implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, EgoStateProcessingFE, ACCControllingFE
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi communication protocol enabling real-time data transfer between physical twin and digital twin entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance OPCUAProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA protocol for future extension of data translation and interoperability between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance DBSCANClustering : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineeringComponent [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for object detection and tracking from raw point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudDataRaw
    DTDFVocab:outputs ProcessedObjectTracks
]

instance KalmanFilter : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineeringComponent [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for state estimation and object tracking refinement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudDataRaw
    DTDFVocab:outputs ProcessedObjectTracks
]

// C12: Feature Engineering Components
instance PointCloudClusteringFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineeringComponent [
    base:desc "Feature engineering component implementing DBSCAN clustering for object detection and tracking from raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudDataRaw
    DTDFVocab:outputs ProcessedObjectTracks
]

instance EgoStateProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineeringComponent [
    base:desc "Feature engineering component processing ego vehicle state metrics (speed, steering angle) for ACC control inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateMetrics
    DTDFVocab:outputs ProcessedEgoStateMetrics
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineeringComponent [
    base:desc "Feature engineering component serializing data for inter-entity communication using ISO 23247 standards"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudDataRaw, DepthImageData, ProcessedObjectTracks, ProcessedEgoStateMetrics
]

// C13: Digital Twin Components
instance ACCControllingFE : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinComponent [
    base:desc "Digital Twin component hosting ACC control logic for real-time decision making based on processed state data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeStateModel, CurrentStateMetrics
    DTDFVocab:outputs ACCControlCommands
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinComponent [
    base:desc "Digital Twin component providing 3D visualization interface for ACC system monitoring and performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADVisualizationModel, RealTimeStateModel
    DTDFVocab:outputs RealTimeVisualizationOutput
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinComponent [
    base:desc "Digital Twin component implementing remote management interface for ACC control commands and settings"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimeseriesReportData
    DTDFVocab:outputs RemoteManagementCommands
]

// C14: Physical Twin Components
instance PhysicalTwinVehicle : DTDFVocab:PhysicalTwin [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor,
                 HokuyoLiDARActuator, VedderElectronicSpeedController, VedderSteeringActuator,
                 NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, NVIDIAJetsonNX
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:PhysicalComponent [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting perception processing components for ACC system"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:PhysicalComponent [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer providing additional processing capacity for ACC control algorithms"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via the **Actuation FE** (converting desired speed commands into motor voltage) and **Control Panel FE** (sending emergency braking or ACC enable/disable commands). The DT Entity’s **Controlling FE** computes ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed adjustment) and forwards commands to the Physical Twin Entity’s **Actuation FE**, which executes them on the vehicle’s motor and steering servo. The system ensures ≤100 ms end-to-end latency for real-time control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time granularity**, with critical operations (e.g., ACC control loops) synchronized to ≤100 ms latency. The system mandates **100 ms clock synchronization accuracy** between devices for event ordering and data integrity, aligning with 3GPP V2V communication standards. The DT processes data at sensor-specific rates (e.g., LiDAR point clouds at high frequency), but exact rates are not specified beyond real-time requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of three primary entities: **Physical Twin Entity** (hosts sensors/actuators and data pre-processing), **Digital Twin Entity** (executes ACC logic, data collection, and reporting), and **User Entity** (3D Visualization and Control Panel). The **Cross-System Entity** (Data Translation FE) ensures interoperability between entities. The architecture is **centralized**, with minimal horizontal integration (e.g., no external DTs)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for **cyber-physical experimentation** and validation of ACC requirements (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance) via simulation and 3D virtualization (generalized from background context).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: The PT is **retrofitted** with autonomy components (LiDAR, Jetson devices) to enable DT integration.
  - **Operational Phase**: The DT supports **real-time monitoring, remote management, and computation offloading** during vehicle operation. The system is deployed as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop**, enabling operators to intervene remotely."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through **real-time data synchronization** (≤100 ms latency) and **clock synchronization** (100 ms accuracy). Validation mechanisms include **ISO 15622 compliance** for ACC performance, **verification of sensor data processing** (DBSCAN/Kalman filter), and **user feedback** via remote management. Uncertainty is mitigated by **external data storage** (SQL database) and **report generation** for post-operation analysis. No explicit uncertainty quantification is provided."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses **ROS2 network** for intra-entity communication and **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity (vehicle-to-DT) communication. The system mandates **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP V2V standard) and **100 ms clock synchronization** for distributed systems. Data serialization is handled by the **Data Translation FE** (ISO 23247), ensuring unit consistency across streams. Protocols include ROS2 topics for sensor data and custom Wi-Fi messages for control commands."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **hybrid architecture**: the **Physical Twin Entity** runs on the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle (Jetson Orin Nano + ROS2), while the **Digital Twin Entity** and **User Entity** are hosted on external cloud/edge infrastructure. The **Data Storage** component resides externally (SQL database) to accommodate large real-time datasets. Deployment follows ISO 23247’s entity-based structure, with each FE implemented as a ROS2 package."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is **minimal**; the DT primarily interacts with the physical twin and external databases (SQL). No integration with other DTs or external systems (e.g., fleet management platforms) is documented. The system focuses on **closed-loop ACC control** and **real-time monitoring**, with no cross-DT coordination features."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **ISO 23247** (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2) for architecture and ISO 15622 for ACC compliance. The system uses **ROS2** (Robot Operating System 2) for middleware, **OPC UA** (potential future extension), and **Wi-Fi** for communication. The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing a **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) and splitting the User Interface FE into visualization and control panel components."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed through:
  - **Safety**: Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC actuation, ensuring deterministic control and human-in-the-loop (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin).
  - **Synchronization**: ±100 ms clock accuracy prevents timing attacks and ensures data integrity.
  - **Latency constraints**: ≤ **100 ms** latency prevents malicious interference in real-time control loops.
  - **No explicit security protocols**: Not detailed in the document (e.g., encryption, access controls)."
]
